title: Stray Dog: Kerberos Panzer Cops
original_title: ケルベロス 地獄の番犬
overview: An elite police unit, rebelled against disarmament orders. Their leader Koichi escaped after the uprising. Years later, ex-member Inui seeks him, encountering unexpected twists. Upon finding Koichi, Inui realizes he's been manipulated.
